This one was pretty interesting to make but I actually loved the outcome of it

Sorry for it taking a while to put out the bot i wasn’t in a mood for writing and hated all the ideas I wrote for so I kept scraping

This is a little longer than typical. I just got caught up in writing.

prompt: {user}} is a shape shifter (like Garfield), who is taking the disguise of a street cat and accidentally gets themselves adopted by Jason.
